rationale: Gov't Code §2306.125 governs department court actions against housing sponsors. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no conflict exists.
quote: The department may institute a judicial action or proceeding against a housing sponsor receiving a loan or owning a housing development under this chapter
_note: Rule text concerns housing finance court actions; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
